expectations.text: Applies the deletion test by name to the repository
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'Apply the deletion test first: if you deleted `WarehouseRepository`...' and concludes 'The module fails the deletion test.'

expectations.text: Identifies the wrapper as shallow / pass-through / hypothetical seam
expectations.evidence: 'shallow pass-through with no depth', 'hypothetical seam', 'one adapter (EF Core / SQL), no substitute' — all three named.
'Delete `WarehouseRepository`. Inline the EF Core calls at each call site.'

expectations.text: Pushes back on 'swap EF Core later' as the one-adapter / hypothetical-seam anti-pattern
expectations.evidence: '## On the "swap EF Core later" argument — This is the one-adapter anti-pattern with a hypothetical justification.'

expectations.text: Identifies the real seam location: DbContext / EF Core provider level
expectations.evidence: 'The real swap seam — if you ever needed one — lives at the `DbContext` level anyway (EF Core providers), not at a hand-rolled repository layer above it.' Also mentions UseInMemoryDatabase.

expectations.text: Uses at least 3 of the skill vocabulary terms
expectations.evidence: Uses seam, shallow, depth, leverage, locality, hypothetical, adapter — well above 3.

expectations.text: Ends with 'Which of these would you like to explore?' or equivalent
expectations.evidence: Final line: 'Which of these would you like to explore?'
